variant: give me one fact about creatine

request.message: give me one fact about creatine

response_body.response: creatine monohydrate increases phosphocreatine stores in muscle, which speeds up atp regeneration during high-intensity work, letting you squeeze out more reps or power before fatigue kicks in. the research is solid: 3–5g daily for 3–4 weeks shows measurable strength and muscle gains, especially paired with resistance training.

products.name: NOW Sports Creatine Monohydrate Powder (1 lb)
products.description: Pure creatine monohydrate — 5g/day, single most evidence-backed supp.

variant: give me one fact about collagen

request.message: give me one fact about collagen

response_body.response: collagen is the most abundant protein in your body, making up roughly 30% of total protein mass. it's the structural scaffolding in skin, tendons, bones, and connective tissue, which is why it degrades with age and sun exposure — that's why older skin loses firmness and wrinkles deepen.

products.name: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein
products.description: 24g whey isolate per scoop — third-party tested, low-cost per gram.
